topics.title: Satellite Radio and Sports Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the early history of satellite radio technology, critiques Dr. Phil's media presence, and analyzes current baseball performances.

topics.title: Limousine Climate Control Issues
topics.summary: The studio discusses the technical failures of a limousine's heating and cooling system, specifically focusing on a manual valve that prevents simultaneous use of both features.

topics.title: Malfunctioning Limo and Sopranos Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores the frustrations of a limo driver with a broken climate control system before transitioning into a detailed critique of recent episodes of The Sopranos.

topics.title: Limo Climate Control Issues
topics.summary: The studio discusses a limousine with malfunctioning heating and air conditioning systems that requires a manual petcock switch to operate.

topics.title: Limo Ride Issues and Celebrity Reunion
topics.summary: The studio discusses a technical issue regarding a limousine's heating system before transitioning to an interview with Mary Jo, who reflects on her life after the media circus surrounding Joey McFarland.

topics.title: Mary Jo Connery Discusses Relationship with Joey Budafuco
topics.summary: The show features Mary Jo Connery discussing her history with Joey Budafuco, the impact of his actions on their children, and his recent public association with Amy Fisher.

topics.title: Amy Fisher and Jack Nicholson
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the ongoing saga of Amy Fisher's public persona and legal history before transitioning to a clip of an interview with actor Jack Nicholson.

topics.title: Hillary Clinton and Robin Song Parody
topics.summary: The studio discusses a clip of Hillary Clinton losing her voice during a commencement speech, the challenges of giving public speeches at family events, and a guest appearance by Bill Soto, who won a contest for his parody song "Ham Hands."

topics.title: Ham Hands Bill Performance and Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a performance by Ham Hands Bill, who shares details about his life, his relationship with his daughter, and his musical history before participating in a comedy game.

topics.title: Trivia Game and Adult Industry News
topics.summary: The studio features a trivia game involving questions about poultry and geography before transitioning to discussions on adult film news, local reports, and a guest appearance.

topics.title: High School Student Appearance
topics.summary: The studio debates whether to allow an 18-year-old high school student to appear nude for a promotional segment.

topics.title: Host Refuses to Strip High Schooler
topics.summary: The studio debates whether a guest should be allowed to strip on air after her brother requests it as part of a promotional deal for his herbal products.

topics.title: American Idol Investigation and Hamptons Rental Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses an investigation into American Idol voting integrity and clarifies reports regarding a high-priced summer rental in the Hamptons.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Comedy Sketches
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity appearances on American Idol, upcoming concert tours, the film Brooklyn Rules, and local news regarding a woman falling through a city grate.

topics.title: Amber Lee Introduction
topics.summary: The studio introduces Amber Lee as the June selection for Miss Howard TV and discusses her modeling career, personal life, and appearance.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show features a segment on celebrity news including film promotions, horse racing results, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
